description: Bill of divorce (geṭ). Draft. Dated: 7 Tammuz 1376 Seleucid, which is 1065 CE. Husband: ʿEli b. David. Wife; Milāḥ bt. Avram. Written and signed by ʿEli b. ʿAmram.Also signed by Aharon b. Yefet. Not delivered. See also T-S 10J2.6, a bill of divorce for the same couple from several years later, also not delivered. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: גט; טיוטה; מתוארך: 7 לתמוז 1376 שטרות = 1065 לספירה; הבעל: עלי בן דוד; האישה: מילאח בת אברם; לא נמסר
